title: Bakhira Sanctuary
tagline: Bakhira Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: The Bakhira Bird Sanctuary is the largest natural flood plain wetland of India in Sant Kabir Nagar district of Eastern Uttar Pradesh.
overview.description: The Bakhira Bird Sanctuary is the largest natural flood plain wetland of India in Sant Kabir Nagar district of Eastern Uttar Pradesh. The sanctuary was established in 1980. It is situated 44 km west of Gorakhpur city 18 km away from khalilabad and 55 km away from basti. It is a vast stretch of water body expanding over an area of 29 km2.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bakhira Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bakhira Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bakhira Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (164 km) and the nearest railway station is Gorakhpur Junction (31 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bakhira Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bakhira Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bakhira Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bakhira Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bakhira Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ledwa Mahua, Menhdawal.
